trailingComments.value:
*
 * Oracle Connection Manager
 *
 * Get connections, validate and disconnect them.
 * AbstractConnectionManager pooling use it to handle Oracle specific connections
 * Use github.com/oracle/node-oracledb to connect with Oracle server
 *
 * @private

*
   * Method for checking the config object passed and generate the full database if not fully passed
   * With dbName, host and port, it generates a string like this : 'host:port/dbname'
   *
   * @param {object} config
   * @returns {Promise<Connection>}
   * @private

leadingComments.value:
*
   * Method for checking the config object passed and generate the full database if not fully passed
   * With dbName, host and port, it generates a string like this : 'host:port/dbname'

   * @param {object} config
   * @returns {Promise<Connection>}
   * @private

trailingComments.value: Expose this as a method so that the parsing may be updated when the user has added additional, custom types

leadingComments.value: Expose this as a method so that the parsing may be updated when the user has added additional, custom types

trailingComments.value:
*
   * Connect with Oracle database based on config, Handle any errors in connection
   * Set the pool handlers on connection.error
   * Also set proper timezone once connection is connected.
   *
   * @param {object} config
   * @returns {Promise<Connection>}
   * @private
Setting the sequelize database version to Oracle DB server version to remove the roundtrip for DB version query

leadingComments.value: Setting the sequelize database version to Oracle DB server version to remove the roundtrip for DB version query
We split to get the error number; it comes as ORA-XXXXX:

trailingComments.value: ORA-12154: TNS: Could not resolve the connect identifier specified

leadingComments.value: ORA-12154: TNS: Could not resolve the connect identifier specified

trailingComments.value: ORA-12505: TNS: Listener does not currently know of SID given in connect descriptor

leadingComments.value: ORA-12505: TNS: Listener does not currently know of SID given in connect descriptor

trailingComments.value: ORA-12514: TNS: Listener does not currently know of service requested in connect descriptor
